hero_subtitle: SFTY provides a phased, role-based compliance operating layer that preserves audit evidence and strengthens governance for secure institutional deployment and procurement.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Without a clear operational model, compliance deployment can become fragmented and difficult to govern across providers and jurisdictions. This creates audit trails that lack integrity and increases manual workload during bank due diligence and regulatory reviews.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes provider outputs, role-based access, audit logs and evidence integrity into a controlled workflow that supports phased deployment, operational governance and streamlined bank due diligence for VASPs.
workflow_title: From deployment setup to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY guides controlled deployment through role-based access, permissions, audit logs and evidence preservation to support enterprise trust and procurement risk reduction.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented tools. One audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a provider-neutral compliance layer that connects workflows, decisions, evidence and audit trails to reduce implementation risk and support phased deployment.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs with phased implementation, preserving audit-ready evidence and bank due diligence readiness within secure, permissioned enterprise environments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support secure enterprise compliance deployment
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how phased deployment reduces implementation risk
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit logs preserve evidence integrity and history
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how role-based access controls support governance
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for institutional compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a centralized compliance control layer that connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and reporting workflows into one auditable and scalable system for institutional teams.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY manage compliance workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures provider outputs into regulated workflows, routing reviews, opening cases, recording decisions and linking evidence for clear governance and consistent operational control.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and evidence packages with audit logs that support review readiness and clear traceability across compliance actions.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, overlaying their outputs without replacing current tools or disrupting established compliance stacks.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing digital asset providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above providers, orchestrating their outputs into structured decisions, cases and reports while maintaining provider neutrality and integration flexibility.
final_title: Review secure phased deployment with SFTY
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports role-based access, audit evidence and governance to reduce implementation risk for VASP compliance operations.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
